# engineering-board

> A git-committed kanban board your AI agents run and remember. The board is
> the database: coordination state, work-in-progress locks, and durable
> learnings live as plain markdown inside your repo — no hidden DB, no external
> service, no daemon. Ships as a Claude Code plugin and as a zero-dependency
> MCP server (12 tools over stdio, protocol 2025-06-18).

## What it is

engineering-board turns a committed markdown tree (engineering-board/<project>/)
into an autonomous, multi-agent software-engineering board:

- Findings (bugs, features, questions, observations) are captured passively
  from every Claude Code session by a Stop hook.
- A PM pipeline consolidates findings into real board entries, deterministically.
- Worker agents drive each entry through a tdd -> review -> validate state
  machine under atomic (mkdir-based) claim locking, so parallel agents never
  collide.
- Recurring lessons promote into committed Learning entries (L###) that survive
  session boundaries; board_remember / /board-remember saves one on demand.
- BOARD.md (the index) and board.html (a themed kanban view with search,
  filters, stats, and coordination panels) are regenerated deterministically.

Who it's for: developers running Claude Code (or any MCP client) who want their
agents' task state and memory to be repo-committed, PR-reviewable, and shared
with the team — instead of per-user state in ~/.claude/ or a local database.

How it differs from the 2026 field (beads, Backlog.md, Task Master, Claude
Code's built-in Tasks, claude-mem): it is the intersection — PR-reviewable
markdown state AND durable memory AND atomic claim-locking AND passive per-turn
capture AND an opinionated pipeline AND a published team-visible board.

## Install

Claude Code plugin (full autonomous pipeline; requires Claude Code, free):

    /plugin marketplace add GhostlyGawd/engineering-board
    /plugin install engineering-board
    /board-setup

MCP server, primary path — one line from PyPI (published from v1.7.0):

    claude mcp add engineering-board -- uvx engineering-board-mcp

MCP server, fallback — run from a clone:

    git clone https://github.com/GhostlyGawd/engineering-board
    claude mcp add engineering-board -- python3 "$(pwd)/engineering-board/mcp-server/engineering_board_mcp.py"

Works with any MCP client — Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Claude Desktop
config blocks:
https://github.com/GhostlyGawd/engineering-board/blob/main/mcp-server/README.md

## MCP tools (12)

- board_init: scaffold a project board; optional agents_md writes a usage block
  into the repo's AGENTS.md for hook-less agents.
- board_list_projects: list projects from BOARD-ROUTER.md.
- board_create_entry: create a validated entry, allocate the next id, rebuild
  the index; optional parent links a subtask.
- board_list_entries: list entries; filters project/type/status/needs/ready
  (ready = open with all existing blockers resolved).
- board_get_entry: full markdown + parsed frontmatter of one entry.
- board_update_entry: update frontmatter (status, needs, priority, blocked_by,
  parent), append a section, or append a timestamped comment.
- board_rebuild: deterministically regenerate BOARD.md.
- board_capture_finding: append a finding to the scratch inbox _sessions/.
- board_claim: acquire an entry's atomic claim lock.
- board_release: release an entry's claim lock.
- board_remember: save a durable insight straight to learnings/ (bypasses the
  curator's recurrence threshold).
- board_status: open counts, in_progress/blocked ids, the ready queue,
  dangling-blocker warnings, un-promoted scratch count.
